title: Spanish Courgette Bowl
description: A flavorful and healthy Spanish-inspired dish featuring sautéed courgettes, served in a bowl with a variety of toppings.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
3. Add the courgettes and cook for 5-7 minutes, until tender and lightly browned.
4. Stir in the smoked paprika and season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Transfer the courgette mixture to a bowl and top with grated Manchego cheese.
6. Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
